scripts.test:chrome: env -u NO_COLOR pnpm build && env -u NO_COLOR playwright test -c playwright.config.ts --project=chromium
scripts.test:e2e: env -u NO_COLOR pnpm build && env -u NO_COLOR playwright test -c playwright.config.ts --project=chromium
scripts.test:firefox: env -u NO_COLOR pnpm build:firefox && env -u NO_COLOR playwright test -c playwright.config.ts --project=firefox
scripts.test:firefox:force: env -u NO_COLOR ALLOW_FIREFOX_EXTENSION_TESTS=1 pnpm build:firefox && env -u NO_COLOR ALLOW_FIREFOX_EXTENSION_TESTS=1 playwright test -c playwright.config.ts --project=firefox
scripts.test:live-e2e: env -u NO_COLOR SUMMARIZE_LIVE_E2E=1 pnpm build && env -u NO_COLOR SUMMARIZE_LIVE_E2E=1 playwright test -c playwright.config.ts --project=chromium tests/sidepanel.live-e2e.spec.ts
